# OcsfValidatorComponent

Asset check: validates OCSF v1.x conformance — required fields, severity range, known class_uid set.

## Dependencies
- `pandas`

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `check_name` | `str` | Asset check name |
| `upstream_asset_key` | `str` | OCSF DataFrame asset to validate |

### Catalog metadata

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `description` | `str` | — | — |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `blocking` | `bool` | `true` | Block downstream materializations on failure |
| `require_known_class_uid` | `bool` | `true` | Fail when class_uid is not in the registered OCSF v1.x set |
| `max_invalid_rows` | `int` | `0` | Allowed invalid rows before failure (0 = strict) |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->
